title: LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN validation incomplete
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:81-116

LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN = 9 is validated via BUILD_ASSERT against component sizes defined locally. However, these local constants (LICHEN_FRAME_LENGTH_FIELD etc.) are duplicates of values that should come from a shared header.

What goes wrong: If the actual frame format changes in link.h, the local constants here wont update, and the BUILD_ASSERT will still pass with stale values. The validation provides false confidence.

Better: Reference the authoritative constants from link.h (e.g., LICHEN_FRAME_HDR_LEN if defined) rather than defining local copies.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed LICHEN_FRAME_MIN_MIC to use LICHEN_MIC_32_LEN from link.h
